allow: Bash(cd apps/backend && pnpm run build 2>&1 | tail -30)

Bash(node -e "const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); const result = dotenv.config\({ path: '../../.env' }\); console.log\('DATABASE_URL:', process.env.DATABASE_URL ? 'SET' : 'NOT SET'\); console.log\('DB_HOST:', process.env.DB_HOST ? 'SET' : 'NOT SET'\);")

Bash(node -e "const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); const path = require\('path'\); const envPath = path.join\('apps/backend/src', '../../.env'\); dotenv.config\({ path: envPath }\); const url = process.env.DATABASE_URL; console.log\('DATABASE_URL:', url\); const match = url.match\(/postgres:\\/\\/\([^:]+\):\([^@]+\)@\([^:]+\):\(\\d+\)\\/\(.+\)/\); if \(match\) { console.log\('Parsed - host:', match[3], 'port:', match[4], 'database:', match[5]\); }")

Bash(node -e "const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); dotenv.config\({ path: '.env' }\); const url = process.env.DATABASE_URL; console.log\('DATABASE_URL:', url\); const match = url.match\(/postgres:\\/\\/\([^:]+\):\([^@]+\)@\([^:]+\):\(\\d+\)\\/\(.+\)/\); if \(match\) { console.log\('Parsed - host:', match[3], 'port:', match[4], 'database:', match[5]\); }")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1 2>&1 || echo "Server might be starting...")
Bash(sleep 10 && curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1 2>&1 || echo "Waiting for server...")
